en: Say to your brothers, "You are my people," and to your sisters, "You have received mercy."
zh: “你們要對你們的兄弟說：‘我的子民’；要對你們的姊妹說：‘蒙憐憫的’。

en: "Plead with your mother, plead- for she is not my wife, and I am not her husband- that she put away her whoring from her face, and her adultery from between her breasts;
zh: 要與你們的母親爭論，你們要爭論， 因為她不是我的妻子，我也不是她的丈夫； 好讓她除掉臉上的淫相， 和乳間的淫態，

en: lest I strip her naked and make her as in the day she was born, and make her like a wilderness, and make her like a parched land, and kill her with thirst.
zh: 免得我把她剝光， 赤身露體，使她像剛生下來的那天一樣； 又使她像曠野， 像無水的旱地一般， 叫她因乾渴而死。

en: Upon her children also I will have no mercy, because they are children of whoredom.
zh: 我必不憐恤她的兒子， 因為他們是像娼妓的兒女；

en: For their mother has played the whore; she who conceived them has acted shamefully. For she said, 'I will go after my lovers, who give me my bread and my water, my wool and my flax, my oil and my drink.'
zh: 因為他們的母親賣了淫， 懷他們的作了羞恥的事； 因為她曾說：‘我要跟隨我那些愛人。 我的餅和水， 羊毛和麻布，油和我所喝的，都是他們給的。’

en: Therefore I will hedge up her way with thorns, and I will build a wall against her, so that she cannot find her paths.
zh: 因此，我要用荊棘堵塞她的通道， 我要築牆圍住她，使她找不著出路。

en: She shall pursue her lovers but not overtake them, and she shall seek them but shall not find them. Then she shall say, 'I will go and return to my first husband, for it was better for me then than now.'
zh: 她要追趕她那些愛人，卻追不上； 要尋找他們，卻找不著。 她就說：‘我要回去，回到前夫那裡， 因為從前比現在好得多了。’

en: And she did not know that it was I who gave her the grain, the wine, and the oil, and who lavished on her silver and gold, which they used for Baal.
zh: 其實她不知道，是我把五穀、新酒、橄欖油賜給了她； 甚至他們用來製造巴力的金銀， 也是我大量給她的；

en: Therefore I will take back my grain in its time, and my wine in its season, and I will take away my wool and my flax, which were to cover her nakedness.
zh: 因此，到了收割的時候， 到了出酒的季節， 我必收回五穀和新酒； 用來給她遮蔽裸體的羊毛和麻布， 我也必奪回。

en: Now I will uncover her lewdness in the sight of her lovers, and no one shall rescue her out of my hand.
zh: 那時，我要在她那些愛人眼前， 暴露她的下體； 也沒有人能救她脫離我的手。

en: And I will put an end to all her mirth, her feasts, her new moons, her Sabbaths, and all her appointed feasts.
zh: 我必使她的一切歡樂、 節期、新月、安息日， 或任何盛會都終止。

en: And I will lay waste her vines and her fig trees, of which she said, 'These are my wages, which my lovers have given me.' I will make them a forest, and the beasts of the field shall devour them.
zh: 我必毀壞她的葡萄樹和無花果樹， 就是她曾說：‘這是我作妓女所賺的， 是我那些愛人給我的。’ 我必使這些果樹成為荒林， 任由田野的走獸吃掉。

en: And I will punish her for the feast days of the Baals when she burned offerings to them and adorned herself with her ring and jewelry, and went after her lovers and forgot me, declares the LORD.
zh: 她在拜眾巴力的日子， 向他們燒香， 佩戴耳環首飾，打扮自己， 跟隨她那些愛人，卻把我遺忘，所以我必懲罰她。”這是耶和華說的。

en: "Therefore, behold, I will allure her, and bring her into the wilderness, and speak tenderly to her.
zh: “因此，我要誘導她， 領她到曠野， 對她說安慰的話。

en: And there I will give her her vineyards and make the Valley of Achor a door of hope. And there she shall answer as in the days of her youth, as at the time when she came out of the land of Egypt.
zh: 在那裡我要把葡萄園歸還給她， 使亞割谷變成‘希望之門’。 她必在那裡回應，像她少年的時候一樣， 也像她從埃及地上來的那天一般。”

en: "And in that day, declares the LORD, you will call me 'My Husband,' and no longer will you call me 'My Baal.'
zh: 耶和華說：“到那日， 你必稱呼我‘伊施’ ， 不再稱呼我‘巴力’ 。

en: For I will remove the names of the Baals from her mouth, and they shall be remembered by name no more.
zh: 我要把‘巴力’的名字從她口中除掉； 他們的名字沒有人再提起。

en: And I will make for them a covenant on that day with the beasts of the field, the birds of the heavens, and the creeping things of the ground. And I will abolish the bow, the sword, and war from the land, and I will make you lie down in safety.
zh: 到那日，為了他們， 我必和田野的走獸、 空中的飛鳥、 地上爬行的動物立約； 我必從這地折斷弓弩、刀劍和兵器 ； 使他們安然居住。

en: And I will betroth you to me forever. I will betroth you to me in righteousness and in justice, in steadfast love and in mercy.
zh: 我必聘你永遠歸我， 以公義、正直、 忠信和憐憫聘你歸我。

en: I will betroth you to me in faithfulness. And you shall know the LORD.
zh: 我必以信實聘你歸我； 這樣，你就必認識耶和華。”

en: "And in that day I will answer, declares the LORD, I will answer the heavens, and they shall answer the earth,
zh: 耶和華說：“到那日，我必應允， 我必應允天，天必應允地，

en: and the earth shall answer the grain, the wine, and the oil, and they shall answer Jezreel,
zh: 地必應允五穀、新酒和油。 這些必應允耶斯列 。

en: and I will sow her for myself in the land. And I will have mercy on No Mercy, and I will say to Not My People, 'You are my people'; and he shall say, 'You are my God.'"
zh: 我必為了自己把她栽種在這地。 我必憐恤羅．路哈瑪 。 我必對羅．阿米 說： ‘你是我的子民’， 他必說：‘你是我的 神。’”
